cases.rationale: ChangeStack pushes temporary changes, pops them, and merges for Project.do.

cases.rationale: code_assist returns a global completion proposal for a matching name.

? -  ^
+ local
?   ^
 : proposal <my_global> has wrong scope, expected 'global', got 'local'

cases.rationale: get_definition_location returns the line of an in-memory function definition.
get_definition_location resolves a dotted method definition.
CompletionProposal exposes name, scope, and type for a local variable.
sorted_proposals applies the documented default priorities.
get_calltip reports the callable signature string.
resource enables relative import completion in a package module.

cases.rationale: find_errors reports an unresolved variable line.
find_definition resolves a definition in an imported project module.
resources limits find_occurrences results.
find_occurrences returns Location fields for the selected name.
find_occurrences searches project modules for qualified uses.

cases.rationale: FixModuleNames returns changes that rename a module resource.
Resource.move is history-aware and undo restores the old file path.
Moving a file into a folder is undoable through History.

    with open(path, "rb") as handle:

cases.rationale: Resource.write through project history can be undone to prior contents.
Redo with no available item raises HistoryError.
Undo with no available item raises HistoryError.
Undoing a change that is not available raises HistoryError.
